title: OTT 플랫폼, 한국 드라마 글로벌 동시 방송 시작
summary: 주요 OTT 플랫폼들이 한국 드라마을 글로벌 동시 방송을 시작했습니다.
content: Major OTT platforms began simultaneous global broadcasts of Korean dramas. This initiative aims to reduce piracy through timely releases. Subtitle translations are available in over 30 languages. Viewers in 180 countries can watch episodes immediately after Korean broadcast. Revenue from international streaming has increased dramatically. Local production companies are expanding their global teams. Korean cultural exports are reaching new audiences. The trend is expected to continue with upcoming releases. Analysts project continued growth in content licensing.
